EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} renamed the file "{object.name}" to "{object.new_value}" on the FTP server on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} donwloaded the file "{object.name}" from the FTP server on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the file "{object.name}" from the FTP server on host {event_src.host}
